div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R1: execs the binary as a subprocess (Bash tool)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R2: builds CLI targets and runs targ.Main

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R3: delegates the recall pipeline (Orchestrator + phases) to the dedicated recall package — the one subcommand currently extracted from cli (see Drift Notes)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R4: reads / writes feedback + fact TOML through memory types and helpers

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R5: discovers external source paths and shares the cache via discoverExternalSources

span.p: R6: builds the Anthropic caller used by recall.NewSummarizer

span.p: R7: resolves API token (env or Keychain) before any LLM call
